channel.title: 6pmfestina TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from 6pmfestina

item.title: ᴍᴇʀʀʏ ᴄʜᴛɪꜱᴛᴍᴀꜱ & ʜᴀᴘᴘʏ ʜᴏʟɪᴅᴀʏꜱ 🎄🎅🏻❤️ to everyone who celebrates. 🤍 To everyone who doesn’t or to the ones who stay at home or are lonely, we‘ll have open rooms every day until New Year, every day with a Christmas surprise ❤️ Stream will start from 25.12

item.title: 10‘000 on TikTok! 💖 Thank you so so much for your support and especially to those who are following me from the beginning. 💃🏼🫶🏼 Big thank you also to my partner servers & those who aren’t supporting 😋, MWAH 🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍🤍 #pubgm #pubgmobile #pubgmacademy #pubgmne
